'''√h-k-f''' ('''kahakaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macadam|macadam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macadam|macadam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kahakaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihakaf || jihakaf || shihakaf || kihakaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhakaf || jujuhakaf || shushuhakaf || kukuhakaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhakaf || juhakaf || shuhakaf || kuhakaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhakaf || juhakaf || shuhakaf || kuhakaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehakaf || jehakaf || shehakaf || kehakaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohakaf || jojohakaf || shoshohakaf || kokohakaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohakaf || johakaf || shohakaf || kohakaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohakaf || johakaf || shohakaf || kohakaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf || hakaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhakaf || jæhakaf || shæhakaf || kæhakaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahakaf || jajahakaf || shashahakaf || kakahakaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahakaf || jahakaf || shahakaf || kahakaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahakaf || jahakaf || shahakaf || kahakaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahakaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahakaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahakaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahakafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahakafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahakafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahakafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahakafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahakafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahakafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahakafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahakafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahakafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahakafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahakafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahakafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahakafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahakafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahakafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahakafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahakafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahakafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahakafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahakafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahakafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahakafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahakafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahakafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahakafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahakafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahakafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahakafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahakafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahakafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahakafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahakafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahakafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahakafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahakafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahakafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahakafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahakafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahakafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahakafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahakafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahakafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahakafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahakafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahakafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahakafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahakafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahakafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahakafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahakafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahakafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahakafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahakafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahakafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahakafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahakafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahakafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahakafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahakafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
